name: Aputure Spotlight Mount Set
description: The Aputure Spotlight Mount Set with 36° Lens is a versatile light modifier for producing dramatic yet clean beams of light with a high degree of control.

features.Key Features: Bowens Mount | Included 36°,26°,19° Lens | Dual Drop-In Slots | Aluminum Alloy Housing | Yoke with Dual Junior/Baby Mount | Gobo Holder and 3 x B-Size Gobos | Gel Holder and Cleaning Accessories | Compatible with Optional Iris
features.What’s In The Box: Aputure Spotlight Mount Set with 26° Lens | Aputure Lens for Spotlight Mount System (26°) | 3 x B-Size Gobo | Gobo Holder | Gel Frame | Lens Pen | Blower | Cleaning Cloth | Hard Case
